description.en: Early blight is a fungal disease caused by Alternaria solani. It affects the leaves, stems, and fruits of crops, often causing major harvest loss if not managed quickly.
description.hi: अर्ली ब्लाइट एक कवक रोग है जो Alternaria solani के कारण होता है। यह पत्तियों, तनों और फलों को प्रभावित करता है।
description.kn: ಅರ್ಲಿ ಬ್ಲೈಟ್ ಎನ್ನುವುದು Alternaria solani ಎಂಬ ಶಿಲೀಂಧ್ರದಿಂದ ಉಂಟಾಗುವ ರೋಗ.

en: Brown spots with yellow halos on lower leaves
Target-like concentric rings inside leaf spots
Fruit dropping early or showing dark, leathery pits
hi: निचली पत्तियों पर पीले घेरे के साथ भूरे धब्बे
पत्ती के धब्बों में लक्ष्य जैसे वलय
kn: ಕೆಳಗಿನ ಎಲೆಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಹಳದಿ ಚುಕ್ಕೆಗಳೊಂದಿಗೆ ಕಂದು ಕಲೆಗಳು

en: Ensure proper spacing between plants for airflow
Water at the base of the plant, not the leaves
Mulch soil to prevent fungus from splashing up
hi: हर 2-3 साल में फसल चक्र बदलें
पौधों के बीच उचित दूरी रखें
पत्तियों पर नहीं, जड़ में पानी दें
kn: ಗಾಳಿ ಚಲಾವಣೆಗೆ ಸಸ್ಯಗಳ ನಡುವೆ ಸರಿಯಾದ ಅಂತರ ಇರಲಿ

en.title: Prune Infected Parts
en.description: Remove and burn all infected leaves. Do not compost them.

en.title: Baking Soda Spray
en.description: Mix 1 tbsp baking soda with 1 gallon water. Spray weekly.

en.title: Neem Oil
en.description: Apply Neem oil solution to the entire plant during evening hours.

en.title: Mancozeb Fungicide
en.description: Apply 2.5g per liter of water every 10 days.

en.title: Copper Oxychloride
en.description: Apply 3g per liter. Stop 2 weeks before harvest.

en.title: Chlorothalonil
en.description: Apply as directed on label. Use gloves and mask.

description.en: Late blight is a highly destructive disease caused by Phytophthora infestans. It can destroy an entire crop within days under humid conditions.
description.hi: लेट ब्लाइट Phytophthora infestans के कारण होने वाली विनाशकारी बीमारी है।
description.kn: ಲೇಟ್ ಬ್ಲೈಟ್ Phytophthora infestans ನಿಂದ ಉಂಟಾಗುವ ವಿನಾಶಕಾರಿ ರೋಗ.

en: Dark brown water-soaked patches on leaves
White mold on underside of leaves in humid conditions
Fruits show dark, firm, greasy-looking lesions
Apply preventive fungicide before rainy season

en.title: Remove and Destroy
en.description: Pull out infected plants immediately. Burn them.

en.title: Copper Spray
en.description: Spray copper-based solution every 5-7 days during wet weather.

en.title: Metalaxyl + Mancozeb
en.description: Apply 2.5g per liter every 7-10 days.

en.title: Cymoxanil
en.description: Apply at first sign of disease. Very effective in early stages.

description.en: Rice blast caused by Magnaporthe oryzae is one of the most devastating rice diseases worldwide, capable of causing 100% yield loss.
description.hi: चावल का ब्लास्ट Magnaporthe oryzae के कारण होता है और 100% फसल नुकसान कर सकता है।
description.kn: ಭತ್ತದ ಬ್ಲಾಸ್ಟ್ Magnaporthe oryzae ನಿಂದ ಉಂಟಾಗಿ 100% ಇಳುವರಿ ನಷ್ಟ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು.

en: Diamond-shaped lesions with grey center on leaves
Neck of panicle turns brown and breaks
Plant in rows with adequate spacing

en.title: Silicon Application
en.description: Apply silica-rich material to soil to strengthen cell walls.

en.title: Trichoderma
en.description: Apply Trichoderma viride as seed treatment.

en.title: Tricyclazole
en.description: 0.6g per liter. Most effective against blast.

en.title: Isoprothiolane
en.description: Apply at tillering and panicle initiation stages.

description.en: Leaf rust caused by Puccinia triticina is the most common rust disease of wheat globally, causing 10-40% yield losses.

en: Orange-brown pustules on upper leaf surface
Circular to oval lesions scattered on leaves
Early sowing to avoid peak rust season
Monitor fields weekly during growing season

en.title: Sulfur Dust
en.description: Apply sulfur dust in morning when dew is present.

en.title: Propiconazole
en.description: Apply 1ml per liter at first sign of rust.

en.title: Tebuconazole
en.description: Apply 1ml per liter. Protects for 3-4 weeks.

description.en: Boll rot is a complex disease involving multiple fungi and bacteria that cause cotton bolls to rot before they open, causing major yield loss.

en: Dark water-soaked spots on young bolls
Bolls fail to open, remain closed and black
Control insects that create entry wounds

en.title: Remove Infected Bolls
en.description: Remove and destroy all infected bolls immediately.

en.title: Copper Fungicide
en.description: Apply preventively at boll formation stage.

description.en: Common rust caused by Puccinia sorghi produces brick-red pustules on both leaf surfaces and can reduce yield significantly in severe cases.

en: Brick-red oval pustules on both sides of leaves
Pustules turn dark brown as they age

en.title: Neem Oil Spray
en.description: Apply weekly as preventive measure.

en.title: Azoxystrobin
en.description: Apply at first pustule appearance.

description.en: No disease detected. Your tomato plant appears healthy. Continue regular monitoring.
description.hi: कोई रोग नहीं मिला। आपका टमाटर का पौधा स्वस्थ है।
description.kn: ಯಾವುದೇ ರೋಗ ಕಂಡುಬಂದಿಲ್ಲ. ನಿಮ್ಮ ಟೊಮ್ಯಾಟೊ ಸಸ್ಯ ಆರೋಗ್ಯಕರವಾಗಿದೆ.

en: Check undersides of leaves for pests
Water consistently at base of plant

en.title: Preventive Neem Spray
en.description: Apply neem oil spray monthly to prevent future disease.

en.title: No treatment needed
en.description: Plant is healthy. No chemical intervention required.
